reasoning_model_1: Model 1 generates the correct text content '记住，诚实是金，永远不要说谎。' (00:00-00:03). However, regarding the prompt '抑扬顿挫' (modulated/rhythmic cadence), the performance is lacking. reasoning_model_2: Model 2 generates the correct text content (00:00-00:05). The delivery aligns exceptionally well with the '抑扬顿挫' (modulated/rhythmic cadence) requirement. model_comparison: Both models achieve perfect content accuracy and high audio fidelity. However, on the specific dimension of '节奏' (Rhythm/Cadence), particularly the requested '抑扬顿挫' style, Model 2 is significantly superior. Model 1 reads the sentence in a quick, standard, and somewhat flat manner (approx. 3 seconds), missing the requested stylistic nuance.
